zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Dallingridge於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布盧姆費爾德時，她的父親Sir John Dalingridge57歲，母親Joan de la Lynde11333歲。她於1362年與Richard Sydenham在英國英格蘭肯特希登哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1402年在英國薩默塞特享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Dallingridge于大约1335年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特布盧姆費爾德时，她的父亲Sir John Dalingridge57岁，母亲Joan de la Lynde11333岁。她于1362年与Richard Sydenham在英国英格兰肯特希登哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1402年在英国薩默塞特享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Dallingridge was born about 1335, in Broomfield, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Dalingridge, was 57 and her mother, Joan de la Lynde, was 11333. She married Richard Sydenham in 1362, in Sydenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1402, in Somerset, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Dallingridge est née environ 1335, à Broomfield, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Dalingridge, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Joan de la Lynde, avait 11333 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Sydenham en 1362, à Sydenham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1402, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Dallingridge um 1335 in Broomfield, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Dalingridge 57 und ihre Mutter Joan de la Lynde 11333. Sie hat 1362 in Sydenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom Richard Sydenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1402 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Dallingridge è nata il circa 1335 nel Broomfield, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Dalingridge, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Joan de la Lynde, aveva 11333 anni. Lei sposato Richard Sydenham nel 1362, nel Sydenham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1402, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Dallingridgeが約1335年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブルームフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir John Dalingridgeは57歳，母Joan de la Lyndeは11333歳であった。1362年にイギリスイギリスケントシデンハムでRichard Sydenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1402年にイギリスソメルセトで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Dallingridge(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브룸필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Dalingridge(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de la Lynde(은)는 11333세였다. 그녀는 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 시데함에서 Richard Sydenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 서머세트에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Dallingridge nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Broomfield, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Dalingridge, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Joan de la Lynde, tinha 11333 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Sydenham em 1362, em Sydenham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1402, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Dallingridge родилась около 1335 г. в местности брумфиелд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Dalingridge было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de la Lynde, 11333. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Sydenham в 1362 г. в местности сиденам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1402 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Dallingridge nació aproximadamente 1335, en Broomfield, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Dalingridge, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Joan de la Lynde, tenía 11333 años. Se casó con Richard Sydenham en 1362, en Sydenham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1402, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
